reason: Verify backend tests, compatibility, and forbidden secret-handling regressions.
Check atomic one-time use, migrations, crash recovery, and SQLite durability.
Check public/admin errors are stable and sanitized at every boundary.
Check no session, token, authorization, raw upstream body, or plaintext CDK reaches logs.
Check web security headers, no-store behavior, and client-side session clearing.
Verify workspace snapshot and redemption result remain consistent across API, DB, queue, worker, and UI.
Verify existing accept, Telegram, and history behavior remains the single implementation.
